items.briefing:
Australian businesses are rapidly adopting AI tools, but a recent report warns that many are moving faster than their security practices can keep up with. As platforms like ChatGPT expand their offerings locally, staff should be aware that using AI tools at work can introduce risks around data privacy and information handling if not managed carefully.

Scamwatch continues to monitor active scams targeting Australians — always verify unexpected requests for money or personal information, even if they appear to come from a trusted source.

**Tip:** Before using any new AI tool for work tasks, check with your IT or management team that it's approved for use with company data.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: ACSC warns of large-scale CMS vulnerability campaign actively targeting Australian organisations.
